prestazioni: Engine: 6.0L W12 twin-turbo (engine code: **CW12**) with a **Garrett GT35R hybrid turbo upgrade** (custom billet compressor wheel, 67mm inducer, 88mm exducer) paired with a **Precision Turbo wastegate actuator (PT5768)** for 22 psi peak boost, replacing the stock BorgWarner units. Supporting mods include **Forgeline Motorsports 3.0L air-to-water intercoolers** with **PWR radiators** and **AEM 4000cc/min fuel injectors** to handle the increased airflow.

Drivetrain: **Quaife ATB helical LSD** (part #QDF15Y) for the ZF 8HP90 transmission, paired with a **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 twin-disc ceramic clutch** (specifically designed for the CW12’s 750+ lb-ft torque capacity). **Alcon 6-piston monoblock calipers** with **380mm two-piece rotors** (floating design) replace the stock Brembo setup for improved heat dissipation under track use.

ECU & Tuning: **Syvecs S12 standalone ECU** (direct plug-and-play for CW12) with **custom 2D/3D ignition and fuel maps** developed on a **Mustang MD1000 dyno**, targeting **850 hp at 6,200 RPM and 900 lb-ft at 4,000 RPM** on **100-octane race fuel**. **Motec C125 dash logger** integrated for real-time monitoring of AFR, boost, and oil temps, with **AEM X-Series wideband sensors** for closed-loop lambda control.
estetica: **Mulliner Carbon Edition body kit** (OEM Bentley part #3W564000) with **custom 3M Matte Satin Black wrap** (2080 series) and **Vorsteiner V-FF107 22-inch forged wheels** (9.5J front, 11.5J rear, ET35 offset) in **Gunmetal Grey with polished lip**. **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody conversion** (modified to fit Mulliner’s rear haunches) with **custom carbon fiber fender flares** (dry carbon, 3K twill weave) and **APR Performance GT300 rear wing** (3D-printed titanium mounting brackets).

**Bentley Mulliner ‘Diamond Stitch’ interior** (OEM part #3W564001) reupholstered in **Bridge of Weir ‘Deep Navy’ leather** with **Alcantara headliner** (custom perforated pattern). **Recaro Pole Position seats** (carbon shell, part #80286-500) with **Schroth 6-point harnesses** (FHR-compatible) and **MOMO ‘Mod.78’ steering wheel** (380mm diameter, suede grip, quick-release hub). **Custom LED ambient lighting** (RGBW, controlled via **Alpine iLX-F509** head unit) synced to engine RPM via **Syvecs CAN bus integration**.

**Forge Motorsport titanium exhaust system** (4.5-inch diameter, **Inconel 625 headers** with **valved bypass for backpressure control**) featuring **dual 100mm carbon fiber tips** (angled 15 degrees downward for clearance). **Custom front splitter** (dry carbon, **3D-scanned from Mulliner’s aero data**) with **active Gurney flap** (electrically adjustable via **Audi R8 V10’s DTM-derived actuator**). **HRE FF03 wheels** (23-inch, 10J/12J) for show use, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires** (275/30R23 front, 325/25R23 rear) for track days.
